queries.question: For each patient advocate, show me the issue name and description.
queries.sql: select patient_advocates.name , issues.issue_name , issues.description from Patient_Advocates_Issues join Issues on Patient_Advocates_Issues.issue_id = Issues.id join Patient_Advocates on Patient_Advocates_Issues.patient_advocate_id = Patient_Advocates.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?issue_name ?description WHERE {
  ?patient_advocates_issues a :Patient_Advocates_Issues .
  ?issues a :Issues .
  ?patient_advocates_issues p:hasIssues ?issues .
  ?patient_advocates a :Patient_Advocates .
  ?patient_advocates_issues p:hasPatient_Advocates ?patient_advocates .
  ?patient_advocates p:name ?name .
  ?issues p:issue_name ?issue_name .
  ?issues p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: Give me the issue name and description for each patient advocate.
queries.sql: SELECT Issues.issue_name, Issues.description  from Patient_Advocates_Issues join Issues on Patient_Advocates_Issues.issue_id = Issues.id join Patient_Advocates on Patient_Advocates_Issues.patient_advocate_id = Patient_Advocates.id   GROUP BY Patient_Advocates_Issues.issue_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Patient_Advocates_Issues.patient_advocate_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Patient_Advocates)

queries.question: Show me the patient advocates and the corresponding issue descriptions.
queries.sql: select patient_advocates.name , issues.description from Patient_Advocates_Issues join Issues on Patient_Advocates_Issues.issue_id = Issues.id join Patient_Advocates on Patient_Advocates_Issues.patient_advocate_id = Patient_Advocates.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?patient_advocates_issues a :Patient_Advocates_Issues .
  ?issues a :Issues .
  ?patient_advocates_issues p:hasIssues ?issues .
  ?patient_advocates a :Patient_Advocates .
  ?patient_advocates_issues p:hasPatient_Advocates ?patient_advocates .
  ?patient_advocates p:name ?name .
  ?issues p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: Give me the issue description of each patient advocate.
queries.sql: SELECT Issues.description  from Patient_Advocates_Issues join Issues on Patient_Advocates_Issues.issue_id = Issues.id join Patient_Advocates on Patient_Advocates_Issues.patient_advocate_id = Patient_Advocates.id   GROUP BY Patient_Advocates_Issues.issue_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Patient_Advocates_Issues.patient_advocate_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Patient_Advocates)

queries.question: Display the issue that is common for all patient advocates.
queries.sql: SELECT Issues.issue_name  from Patient_Advocates_Issues join Issues on Patient_Advocates_Issues.issue_id = Issues.id join Patient_Advocates on Patient_Advocates_Issues.patient_advocate_id = Patient_Advocates.id   GROUP BY Patient_Advocates_Issues.issue_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Patient_Advocates_Issues.patient_advocate_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Patient_Advocates)

queries.question: For each patient advocate, provide the corresponding issues.
queries.sql: select patient_advocates.name , issues.issue_name from Patient_Advocates_Issues join Issues on Patient_Advocates_Issues.issue_id = Issues.id join Patient_Advocates on Patient_Advocates_Issues.patient_advocate_id = Patient_Advocates.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?issue_name WHERE {
  ?patient_advocates_issues a :Patient_Advocates_Issues .
  ?issues a :Issues .
  ?patient_advocates_issues p:hasIssues ?issues .
  ?patient_advocates a :Patient_Advocates .
  ?patient_advocates_issues p:hasPatient_Advocates ?patient_advocates .
  ?patient_advocates p:name ?name .
  ?issues p:issue_name ?issue_name .
}

Give me the issue description of each patient advocate.
What issues are associated with each patient advocate?
